page.title: Finish account setup
page.description: Complete these steps before entering your workspace.

terms.acceptMarketing: Send me product updates by email
terms.loadError: Couldn't load the legal documents. Try again.
terms.noneRequired: No legal documents are currently required.
terms.documentsUpdated: These documents were updated while you were reading. Please review the latest version and acknowledge again.
terms.errorAcceptDocuments: Please accept all legal documents to continue.

avatar.title: Add a profile picture
avatar.description: Optional. You can change it later in Profile settings.

createOrg.title: Create your first organization
createOrg.description: Optional. Organizations are workspaces where you collaborate with others. You can also create or join one later from the picker.

complete.title: Ready to enter Modulith
complete.description: We'll save your onboarding choices and open the app.
